name: Communication with a web site known to be associated with the Russian business network
notes: This rule triggers when a communication with a web site know to be associated with the Russian business network has been observed.
conditions_text: when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
when the flow matches Application is Web.Malware(rbn)
TD_list: APPLY Communication with a web site known to be associated with the Russian business network on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
AND when the flow matches Application is Web.Malware(rbn)
RED_list: Event name: Communication with the Russian business network

Event description: Communication with a web site known to be associated with the Russian business network.  These typically are involved in fraud, phishing and other activities which could compromise your network
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
